song.title: God Be With You
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) God be with you till we meet again; By His counsels guide, uphold you, With His sheep in love enfold you: God be with you till we meet again.
[C] Chrous Till we meet, till we meet, Till we meet at Jesus’ feet; Till we meet, till we meet, God be with you till we meet again.
[V2] 2) God be with you till we meet again; ’Neath His wings protecting hide you, Daily manna still provide you: God be with you till we meet again.
[V3] 3) God be with you till we meet again; When life’s perils thick confound you, Put His arms unfailing round you: God be with you till we meet again.
[V4] 4) God be with you till we meet again; Keep love’s banner floating o’er you, Smite death’s threat’ning wave before you: God be with you till we meet again.
song.author: Jeremiah E. Rankin
